name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the workflow instead of manual invoicing and follow-ups.
problem_solved: Delayed payments due to inefficient invoicing and reminder processes.
